name: 24"x30" Colorful Landscape Canvas Board Framed Art - Threshold™
description:
Add a soft, serene touch to your space with the 24"x30" Colorful Landscape Canvas Board Framed Art from Threshold™. This vertical artwork features a tranquil landscape in soothing pastel and neutral tones, perfect for creating a calm atmosphere in any room. Framed in durable brown material, the canvas is protected and ready to hang with a convenient sawtooth back mount. The digital art medium highlights the delicate beauty of the scene, making it a charming and subtle statement piece for your home decor.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
